title: Merchandise Q NERV Scarf Had link once now cant find TT
display_title: Merchandise Q NERV Scarf Had link once now cant find TT
wikitext:
[]: Merchandise Q: NERV Scarf. Had link once now can't find. T.T             Quote Post by Qhs » Sun Dec 06, 2009 4:04 am Hey all I have a question. I remember there was a site that was selling NERV scarfs. I had it bookmarked, then I deleted it and then I found it again but didn't bookmark it and then I lost my saved tabs. Now I can't find it anywhere. T.T From what I remember the color scheme was black white and red and had a flannel styling. NERV logo was in red and it was the old style maple leaf one. I think the price was like $24.99 or something. Anyone care to help me with their google-fu? BTW I am new. My name is Sam.

[]:             Quote Post by Ambrosia » Sun Dec 06, 2009 11:04 am Have you remembered to check your browser's history? Was this a Japanese shop, or an American one (since you listed the price in dollars)?

[]:             Quote Post by Qhs » Sun Dec 06, 2009 12:03 pm lol I was thinking about that too. Although I only started to allow browser history just recently so. I liked being anonymous, but then I got frustrated at losing my saved tabs when I close Firefox in the wrong sequence :\ It was definitely an American shop. Not form the big ones, but I think it was one of those homemade kind of things. Something like a cafepress clone although the stuff on sale was not as generic.

[]:             Quote Post by steve_stevenson » Mon Dec 21, 2009 11:20 pm http://www.etsy.com ? there are a few Eva things on there but I couldnt find a scarf edit: omg PIPECLEANER SACHIEL http://www.etsy.com/view_listing.php?listing_id=19811672
